channel.title: Posts on Coriva
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Coriva

item.title: Gamma Scalping Guide: Profiting from Volatility with Delta Hedging
item.description: Gamma scalping explained: from gamma convexity math to delta hedging mechanics, with Python simulations showing P&L under different realized volatility scenarios.

item.title: Dispersion Trading Guide: Shorting Correlation with Options and Python
item.description: A complete guide to dispersion trading: variance decomposition, implied correlation math, Vega-weighted portfolio construction, and Python code for computing correlation signals.

item.title: FactorMiner Paper Review
item.description: Paper review of FactorMiner: a self-evolving agent that uses a skill plus experience memory to mine formulaic alpha factors. Top-40 IC of 8.25% on CSI500, ICIR 0.77, beating AlphaAgent and GPLearn.

item.title: QuantaAlpha: Evolving Alpha Mining as Trajectories
item.description: QuantaAlpha paper review: treat each end-to-end LLM alpha mining run as a trajectory, then evolve via mutation and crossover. IC 0.0472 on CSI 300, with zero-shot transfer to S&P 500 still delivering 19.1% cumulative excess return.

item.title: 0DTE Options Explained: Mechanics, Greeks, and Real P&L Distribution
item.description: A mechanics-first guide to 0DTE options: how Gamma and Theta collapse on the final trading day, payoff profiles for the three main player types, the real P&L distribution from academic studies, and why most retail buyers lose money.

item.title: Qlib Tutorial: From Install to Your First Quant Strategy
item.description: A practical Qlib tutorial: install pyqlib, understand Alpha158, train a LightGBM model, run a backtest, and read the report. With architecture diagrams, runnable code, and a Windows pitfalls checklist.

item.title: vectorbt Tutorial: Vectorized Backtesting in Python
item.description: Hands-on vectorbt tutorial: install, build a dual-SMA crossover, sweep 10,000 parameter combinations, and avoid the freq, signal-shift, and memory pitfalls that silently break backtests.

item.title: AlphaAgent: Regularized Exploration to Fight Alpha Decay
item.description: AlphaAgent paper review: a multi-agent framework with AST deduplication, hypothesis alignment, and complexity control to mine decay-resistant alpha factors on CSI 500 and S&P 500.

item.title: Essential Math for Quant Trading: From Log Returns to Linear Regression
item.description: The math concepts that keep appearing in quant trading articles: log returns, mean and variance, normal distributions and fat tails, covariance matrices, OLS regression, and partial derivatives. Each explained with a trading context and Python code.

item.title: Fama-French Factor Model: From Three Factors to Five
item.description: A beginner-friendly explanation of the Fama-French three-factor and five-factor models, how factors are constructed, Python regression code, and the limitations of factor investing.

item.title: Quant Trading Markets: Stocks, Futures, Options, Forex, Crypto
item.description: A quant trader's comparison of stocks, futures, options, forex, and crypto: trading rules, data ecosystems, leverage, volatility, and which strategies fit each market.

item.title: CTA Strategy Guide: Trend Following, Futures Arbitrage, and Python Implementation
item.description: CTA strategy taxonomy, trend following with dual moving average crossover, futures calendar and intercommodity spread arbitrage, with Python simulation code and backtest results.

item.title: Pairs Trading Guide: Cointegration, Spread Construction, and Python Implementation
item.description: Pairs trading from scratch: why cointegration beats correlation, Engle-Granger testing, spread construction, Z-score signal generation, and Python backtesting code.

item.title: Kelly Criterion and Position Sizing: From Formula to Quant Practice
item.description: Kelly Criterion math, continuous-case derivation, connection to Sharpe ratio, fractional Kelly in practice, multi-asset extension, and Python position sizing simulations.

item.title: Option Greeks Calculator: Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega Online Tool
item.description: Free online option Greeks calculator: instantly compute Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega and second-order Greeks (Vanna, Charm, Volga) with interactive charts. Based on the Black-Scholes model.

item.title: Alpha 101 Liquidity and Composite Factors + Portfolio Construction
item.description: Alpha 101 liquidity and composite factors explained: conditional liquidity, multi-layer decay signals, Boolean factors, plus practical advice on building multi-factor portfolios from 101 alphas.

item.title: Alpha 101 Volatility and Intraday Structure Factors Explained
item.description: Alpha 101 volatility and intraday structure factors broken down: conditional volatility, short-vs-long vol ratio, CLV indicator, VWAP deviation, and nonlinear intraday amplification.

item.title: Alpha 101 Momentum and Reversal Factors Explained
item.description: Alpha 101 momentum and reversal factors broken down: conditional reversal, gap fill strategies, multi-timeframe interactions, and when to follow trends vs bet against them.

item.title: Alpha 101 Price-Volume Divergence Factors Explained
item.description: Deep dive into Alpha 101 price-volume divergence factors: from simple correlation(rank(open), rank(volume)) to three-factor interactions, with full formula breakdowns.

item.title: WorldQuant Alpha 101 Explained: Factor Taxonomy and Operator Reference
item.description: Deep dive into WorldQuant's 101 Formulaic Alphas: all 101 factors classified by economic logic, operator intuition guide, pandas code, and full reference table.

item.title: Volatility Trading Strategies: 6 Ways to Go Long or Short Vol
item.description: Compare 6 volatility trading strategies: Long Straddle, Strangle, Calendar Spread, Short Straddle, Short Strangle, Iron Condor. Use IV Rank to pick the right one.

item.title: Option Greeks in Practice: Strategy Analysis, Hedging, and Gamma Scalping
item.description: Option Greeks in action: strategy decomposition with Greeks, Python-simulated Delta hedging, Gamma Scalping P&L walkthrough, and market-maker risk management.

item.title: Second-Order Greeks: Vanna, Charm, Volga and Volatility Surfaces
item.description: Second-order option Greeks with Python code: Vanna, Charm, and Volga formulas, intuitive explanations, and their role in shaping the volatility surface.

item.title: Option Greeks: Formulas, Python Code, and Charts
item.description: A practical guide to option Greeks under the Black-Scholes framework: Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega formulas with Python code, market-maker hedging insights, and visualizations.

item.title: TA-Lib Python Tutorial: The Complete Guide
item.description: Complete TA-Lib Python tutorial: installation, Function vs Abstract API, technical indicators with parameter tips, candlestick patterns, Pandas integration, and comparison with pandas-ta.

item.title: The Complete Guide to Backtesting Pitfalls in Quantitative Trading
item.description: Common backtesting pitfalls in quantitative trading: overfitting, look-ahead bias, survivorship bias, transaction cost modeling, with Python code examples and a self-check checklist.

item.title: AlphaGPT: Mining Quantitative Factors with LLMs
item.description: A review of the AlphaGPT paper: how LLMs participate in alpha factor mining, comparison with genetic programming, and the human-AI collaborative quant research paradigm.

item.title: A Complete Guide to Quantitative Trading Metrics
item.description: A complete guide to quantitative trading metrics: Sharpe ratio, Sortino, Calmar, maximum drawdown, win rate, with formulas and Python code.

item.title: How to Use yfinance to Download Stock P/E Ratio
item.description: How to retrieve stock P/E ratios using Python's yfinance library with code examples.

item.title: A Tutorial to use yfinance
item.description: A step-by-step guide to installing and using the yfinance Python library to download stock data from Yahoo Finance.
